evidence: Directory exists with 16 files across 4 categories (lifecycle, state, convergence, research output)
Directory exists with 34 scenarios across 7 categories, including graph-aware scenarios (DR-029, DR-031, DR-032, DR-033)
Directory exists with 6 files (capability_matrix, convergence, loop_protocol, quick_reference, spec_check_protocol, state_format)
Both auto and confirm YAMLs correctly invoke the 4 deep-loop-runtime scripts via the reducer; this is a P2 verification task, not P1
deep-research/references/state_format.md exists and documents research-specific fields that differ intentionally from deep-review
deep-research scripts use resolveArtifactRoot from shared review-research-paths.cjs for canonical path resolution; no custom path validation needed
reduce-state.cjs doesn't directly access the coverage-graph DB - it uses scripts for all graph operations
deep-research uses .deep-research.lock which is acquired/released by the YAML workflow; the pattern is already consistent
deep-research doesn't have direct DB access - all graph operations go through scripts
deep-research uses the shared executor-config.ts from deep-loop-runtime; hardening is already inherited
reduce-state.cjs has no dimensions field validation because deep-research is single-dimension by design; there's no multi-dimension pattern to reject
reduce-state.cjs doesn't validate research.md structure. The workflow owns progressive synthesis; reducer has no structural validation role
reduce-state.cjs has no uncoveredQuestions field or tracking logic. The answeredQuestions field exists but there's no reducer-owned surface listing remaining unanswered questions
reduce-state.cjs line 874: .sort() performs lexical string comparison. Files like iteration-10.md and iteration-2.md sort as 'iteration-10' < 'iteration-2' lexicographically
reduce-state.cjs has no validation for Non-Goals/Stop Conditions. The workflow owns initialization validation; reducer has no charter validation role
auto YAML has step_detect_resource_map but confirm YAML doesn't. This asymmetry is intentional - confirm mode has different initialization paths
